scripts.test: node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON --loader ./scripts/resolve-extensionless-ts.mjs --test src/lib/hrv.test.mjs src/lib/serializedAsync.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/bpmSmoothing.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/bpmSeries.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/captureModes.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/captureResult.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/cubicSpline.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/movingAverage.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/measurementTimer.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/beatTickScheduler.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/heartRateManager.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/signalProcessing.test.mjs src/lib/heartRate/sessionPayload.test.mjs src/services/tracking/homeStatsService.test.mjs src/services/notifications/notificationSchedulerCore.test.mjs src/services/notifications/notificationScheduleRecords.test.mjs src/services/paywall/paywallTrialEligibility.test.mjs src/services/supabase/authIdentitySync.test.mjs src/services/supabase/auth.test.mjs src/services/supabase/fetchWithRetry.test.mjs src/services/subscriptions/revenueCatClientCore.test.mjs src/services/subscriptions/entitlementService.test.mjs src/stores/authBootstrap.test.mjs src/hooks/useAppGate.test.mjs
scripts.supabase:types: npx supabase gen types typescript --linked --schema public > src/services/supabase/database.types.ts
scripts.supabase:types:local: npx supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public > src/services/supabase/database.types.ts
scripts.supabase:types:project: sh -c 'test -n "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF" || (echo "Set SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF first" && exit 1); npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF" --schema public > src/services/supabase/database.types.ts'
